title: cordia sonorae
intro: Cordia sonorae, also known as the Sonoran Cordia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia sonorae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or made into a tincture for convenient consumption.
